import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        let toggled = if (b >= 65 and b <= 90) or (b >= 97 and b <= 122)
          b + 32 - 64 * ((b / 32) % 2 * 2 - 1) / 1
        else
          b
        end
        let out = if (b >= 65 and b <= 90) or (b >= 97 and b <= 122)
          if b >= 97
            b - 32
          else
            b + 32
          end
        else
          b
        end
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(out)}"
      when None
        i = i
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
